nasb.text: I establish My covenant with you; and all flesh shall never again be cut off by the water of the flood, neither shall there again be a flood to destroy the earth.”

esv.text: I establish my covenant with you, that never again shall all flesh be cut off by the waters of the flood, and never again shall there be a flood to destroy the earth.”

cnv.text: 我要與你們立約：凡有生命的必不再被洪水除滅，再沒有洪水來毀滅大地了。”

ccb.text: 我与你们立约，不再叫洪水淹没一切生灵，也不再让洪水毁灭大地。”

csbs.text: 我要与你们确立我的约：一切有血肉的，都不会再被洪水除灭；也再没有洪水毁灭大地。”
